title: Department Manager Vacancy at GAP India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at GAP India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
GAP India Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About GAP India Asia Pacific Associates:
GAP India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAP India Asia Pacific Associates!
